reviews.review_description: This game makes me motion sickness I try my best to try to play it and it makes me sick gives me a headache and migraine to the point I got to get off it kills the fun of playing it try to get a refund and they won't refund my money back I don't know why wasted money waste of time he looked it good until I played it now I feel sick planted it's not fun when you getting motion sickness trying to enjoy a game I even got past the tutorial cuz it makes me sick I get to that first part where you get that lightning boost and after that I'm sick I can't play anymore please let me get a refund

This game looks very nice but has a few problems. 
1) it drives slow and the controls are awkward. 
2) your opponents can drive over land but when you try you get stuck infinitely and have to reset the game
3) the annoying music keeps turning itself on no matter how many times you turn it off. 
Otherwise it could be a great game. But I’m seeking a refund.
This game needs a big overhaul in the controls department. It's to easy to lose control due to inaccurate tracking consistency. Also it never feels like you go faster than 5mph.
The games fun and all like the racing part I just got it but I wish there was free roam so I don’t always have to race

I just bought this game and, although I haven't had the chance to play it yet, I am already excited! The trailer and screenshots look fantastic, showcasing stunning graphics and intriguing gameplay. The concept appears unique and engaging, and I can't wait to dive in and explore everything it has to offer.

I purchased this game to support the developer, who clearly put a lot of effort into creating something special. I'll be back with a detailed review once I've had some playtime, but for now, I'm giving it a full five stars based on first impressions and to encourage more great work from this talented team. Keep up the awesome work! 🚀🎮

developer_response.body:
🎮 We appreciate your feedback. We are continuously 
 adding more maps, features and more customization to our game and we are committed to enhancing our game by actively listening to our users. Enjoy your gaming!

reviews.review_description:
Jumped into the game today, very good so far, be careful if you get motion sickness but I had an amazing time flying around on the water hitting the checkpoints and picking up bonus speed boosts.
Jet ski looks super cool
Well done to the devs looking forward to going further into the game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback . We are regularly adding new features and maps while gradually improving gameplay. We're about to launch a new feature related to motion sickness very soon.

reviews.review_description: Got this game using developer key thanks to Meta Quest Promotions, Giveaways and Referrals on Facebook great group with Mark Wainbridge as one of the admins..  Its a good idea for a game but still needs a lot of work, multi player option but nobody in lobby needs more of a fan base, nice to zoom around different locations but felt very still at times we need the jetski to rock with the waves.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are regularly adding more maps. There will be more night maps available soon.

reviews.review_description: Very disappointing,just for me no feeling to the game….refunding this one

Another great find with bags of potential.. You do need your sea legs (VR legs) but that’s the same with most motion riding/driving games.  That said when I changed the camera angle to third person I found it easier to play for longer.  The AI did seem easy to beat, I guess harder AI and also the ability to play others on line will improve as the devs continue to develop the game and more people join the community.  Additionally I found in the setting a switch to go from 72/90/120 Mhz however every time I set to 120 Mhz  and went back to look it had reset to 72.  I am sure the devs will look into a fix for this.  All in all I quite enjoyed this…

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback .We've already fixed the bugs. We are constantly introducing new features and maps while gradually enhancing gameplay.

reviews.review_description:
I know this is a work in progress… so I will leave some constructive criticism.

In settings remove the word “like” it’s there twice and sounds better if removed.

Opponents names need to show correct way around when behind opponents.
Opponents all mostly went in straight line to checkpoints, even straight over land.

My vehicle stopped and not sure if was stuck or just froze.

Sound is ok, but needs improving.

Graphics are ok, they serve the purpose. Pirate ships are too big though.

What did you both put about it in feedback? 

Think I will give it a 2/5 as it’s the only aqua/jet ski racer and the idea is there, but needs big improvements

Will up my rating and update my review, when more improvements come to the game.

I’m from a Facebook page called “Meta Quest Promotions, Giveaways and Referrals”… please feel free to join :)
I can't play sitting down I can't stand long
